index.title: Import
index.description: Review your CSV and PDF import history.
index.scope: Only your own import history is shown.
index.empty: No imports yet. Upload a transaction file to get started.

create.title: Import
create.description: Upload a source file, review the preview, and then apply it.

automaticAccount.balanceSnapshot: Accounts are matched automatically from names in the JSON and can be changed in Preview.
automaticAccount.assetHistory: Asset history is stored as the official Money Forward total without allocation to individual accounts.

actions.dragBookmarklet: Drag this to your bookmarks bar

mobileSuica.title: Mobile Suica PDF Import Rules
steps: Entries with a negative usage amount are imported as expenses.
Charges, carryovers, and zero-value entries do not create transactions.
Train and bus usage is classified as transportation; retail purchases remain uncategorized.
When PDF periods overlap, previously imported entries are excluded as duplicates.
mobileSuica.hint: Sign in to the member menu and save a PDF from SF (Electronic Money) Usage History.

jrePoint.title: JRE POINT Assisted Import
steps: Drag Export JRE POINT History below to your bookmarks bar.
After second-password authentication on JRE POINT history, run the bookmark.
Select the saved JSON file on this page.
jrePoint.privacy: Sign-in details and cookies are not saved. Only history, balances, and expiration dates are exported to JSON.

balanceSnapshot.title: Money Forward Assisted Balance Import
steps: Refresh your linked accounts in Money Forward.
Drag Export Money Forward Balances below to your bookmarks bar.
Run the bookmark from the signed-in Money Forward web app.
Review the export, then select the saved JSON file on this page.
details: Bank deposits are aggregated as official account balances for each financial institution.
Investment funds store account totals plus each holding's quantity, current price, cost basis, valuation, and unrealized gain or loss.
THEO combines holding valuations and cash into the account valuation.
Pensions are exported as Money Forward Pension and matched to each user's pension account.
Card balances are aggregated by card and stored as negative liability balances.
If a populated holdings, deposits, pension, or card table cannot be recognized, export stops because the page structure may have changed.
If only the asset allocation table is missing, the export continues with a warning and omits the total-assets summary.
Opening balances and transactions are unchanged; only balances are recorded after Preview.
balanceSnapshot.update: If you already saved the bookmarklet, replace it with this version that includes page-structure checks.
balanceSnapshot.privacy: Sign-in details and cookies are not saved. Data collection runs inside the signed-in Money Forward page and saves only the balance JSON to your device.

assetHistory.title: Initial Money Forward Asset History Import
steps: Open Asset History in the Money Forward web app.
Download the asset history CSV from the bottom of the page.
Select the CSV, review past total assets and asset classes, and apply it.
In general, run this import only once during initial setup.
assetHistory.hint: After the initial import, build daily history with official balance and valuation imports. The official CSV does not include historical data by holding.

description.default: Review parsed rows and duplicate candidates before applying transactions.
description.balanceSnapshot: Review account matches for official balances and valuations before applying them.
description.assetHistory: Review long-term Money Forward total asset and asset class history before applying it.

preview.deleteImportedConfirm:
Delete “{{filename}}”?
Transactions created by this import will also be deleted.

jrePoint.title: JRE POINT Balance Reconciliation
jrePoint.initialAdjustment: Because this is the first import, the temporary opening balance will be adjusted to {{value}} when applied to match the official balance.

preview.transferHelp: Manual transfer correction fixes the counterparty account. The final direction is recalculated from the amount sign and account types with that account fixed as the candidate. Refunds may run in the opposite direction.

issueSummary.title: Rows that cannot be applied: {{count}}
issueSummary.description: Resolve each row error before applying the import. In an already applied import, the affected row may have been skipped.
issueSummary.importedDescription: This import has already been applied, so its rows cannot be changed here. Rows with errors were skipped when the import was applied.
issueSummary.reimportRequired: To fix this row, import a current CSV that covers the same period. Existing rows will be skipped automatically, leaving only unresolved rows to correct.

advisorySummary.title: Rows safely skipped: {{count}}
advisorySummary.description: These entries were intentionally not imported to prevent double counting. The audit note remains, but no action is needed.

transferResolutionHelp.title: When the transfer destination is not found
transferResolutionHelp.currentImport: To fix only this import, open the affected row, select a counterparty account, and choose Apply.
transferResolutionHelp.futureImports: To resolve it automatically next time, add the following description to the counterparty account's import aliases.
transferResolutionHelp.editSelectedAccount: Edit aliases for the selected account →
transferResolutionHelp.reparseAfterEdit: After saving the alias, return here and choose Reanalyze to verify the result.

rowMessages.categoryCsv: Category resolved from the source file's primary and secondary category columns
rowMessages.categoryRule: Category filled by a Classification Rule
rowMessages.subcategoryRule: Subcategory filled by a Classification Rule

balancePreview.intro: Confirm each source account name, balance type, and update time. Card balances are stored as negative liabilities in the app.

diagnostics.title: Money Forward page structure check: {{status}}
diagnostics.summary: Exporter v{{version}} · {{investments}} holdings tables · deposits: {{deposits}} · pensions: {{pensions}} · {{cards}} card tables
diagnostics.missingPortfolio: The asset allocation table was not recognized, so the total-assets summary is omitted. Verify the account balance and holding valuation counts and totals.
diagnostics.legacyDescription: Page structure diagnostics are unavailable. Review the amounts and account count with extra care.

replacement.title: Replace Same-Day Balance
replacement.selectedHint: When applied, the existing same-day balance will be deleted and replaced with this balance and its holding details.
replacement.unselectedHint: No replacement has been scheduled. Compare both values before selecting one.

balancePreview.rememberMapping: Add this source name as an import alias and match it automatically in future imports
balancePreview.duplicateHint: The duplicate balance will be skipped; any missing holding details will still be added.

assetHistoryPreview.initialImportTitle: Asset history CSV is for initial setup
assetHistoryPreview.initialImportDescription: Historical monthly data generally needs to be imported only once. Months already stored are skipped automatically and need no review or correction. Build ongoing daily history with official balance and valuation imports.
assetHistoryPreview.alreadyImported: Already imported (automatically skipped; no action needed)
